action_text: Click the chart options button next to “All Incidents by Assignment”
rationale: Seeing a data table for the chart will give exact incident counts per agent so we can identify the minimum and agents at that value reliably.

action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart (likely “Miranda Frederick”)
rationale: Hovering a smallest bar should display a tooltip with the agent name and exact count to determine the minimum.

action_text: Hover over the adjacent small bar (likely “Luke Wilson”)
rationale: Check another very small bar to confirm the minimum value and gather all agents tied at that minimum.

action_text: Hover over the second-from-right small bar to reveal its tooltip
rationale: Ensure we capture all candidates at the minimum by inspecting the second-from-right small bar.

action_text: Hover over the next small bar (likely “Howard Johnson”)
rationale: Compare another low bar’s tooltip to verify the minimum count and list of agents at that value.
